sourcesContent:
import React from 'react'; import { Link } from 'react-router-dom'; import { eventSequel, stats, services, testimonials } from '../../data/siteData'; import './Home.css'; export default function Home() { return (
{/* ── HERO ── */}
✦ India's Premier Fashion Event Platform

Where Talent
Meets the Runway

Fashion Runway presents a meticulously curated series of events — Designer's Meet, Model Screening, and the grand Mega Show. Your journey to the spotlight starts here.

🟢 Registrations Open 📅 Delhi NCR · Mumbai · Chandigarh
Explore Events ✦ Apply as Model
Grand Finale 2026 Designer Verse New Delhi
26 MAY 2026
Workshop
{/* Scroll hint */}
Scroll
{/* ── TICKER ── */}
{[...Array(2)].map((_, i) => ( FASHION SHOWSMODEL SCREENINGS DESIGNER'S MEETMODELING WORKSHOPS PORTFOLIO SHOOTSHIRE A MODEL FASHION SHOWSMODEL SCREENINGS DESIGNER'S MEETMODELING WORKSHOPS PORTFOLIO SHOOTSHIRE A MODEL ))}
{/* ── SEQUEL EVENTS ── */}
Event Series 2026

Sequel of Designer Verse '26

Fashion Runway plans sequel-wise events leading to the grand finale. Join us at any stage.

{eventSequel.map((ev, idx) => (
{String(idx + 1).padStart(2, '0')}
{ev.status === 'registrations-open' ? '🟢 Registrations Open' : '⏳ Coming Soon'}
{ev.tag}

{ev.title}

📅 {ev.date}  |  📍 {ev.city}

{ev.description}

    {ev.highlights.map(h =>
  • ✦ {h}
    • )}
{ev.applyLink ? ( Apply Now ) : ( Coming Soon )}
))}
{/* ── STATS ── */}
{stats.map(s => (
{s.num} {s.label}
))}
{/* ── SERVICES ── */}
What We Offer

Our Services

{services.map(s => (
{s.icon}

{s.title}

{s.desc}

→ ))}
{/* ── ABOUT STRIP ── */}
Who We Are

The Drive & Passion
Fuelling Our Fashion Events

If you are innovative, have a creative mind, or wish to work on Fashion Runway initiatives — this platform is for you. We empower talented designers, models, makeup artists, photographers, and creatives shaping the future of fashion.

Start Your Journey → Get in Touch
{/* ── TESTIMONIALS ── */}
What They Say

Success Stories

{testimonials.map(t => (

"{t.text}"

{t.name} {t.role}
))}
{/* ── BOTTOM CTA ── */}
Don't Miss Out

YES! You Can Be the
Next Top Model. Then Why Wait…

Registrations are open for Model Screening-II and Designer's Meet-II. Limited slots available.

Apply as Model Apply as Designer
); }
